user.description: If you need help with the configuration have a look here: {documentation_url}

error.connection: Unable to connect to the server.

abort.already_configured: This API key is already configured.

user.description: Name your location and choose whether to use Home Assistant's location or a custom one.

location.description: Pick the location for which to fetch the forecast.

forecast.description: Configure the weather forecast. Each request costs MeteoBlue credits: daily 4000, hourly 8000.

data_description.forecast_type: Daily (4000 credits/request) or Hourly (8000 credits/request). When Hourly is selected, the daily forecast is synthesized from hourly data — no extra request is needed.
data_description.forecast_update_interval: How often to fetch the forecast. Shorter intervals consume credits faster. Minimum 6 hours.

reconfigure.description: Name your location and choose whether to use Home Assistant's location or a custom one.

data.enable_hourly_clouds_and_wind: Additional hourly clouds and wind data

data_description.enable_hourly_clouds_and_wind: Add the MeteoBlue clouds-1h and wind-1h packages to the basic-1h hourly request so cloud coverage and wind gusts can be exposed.

error.location_required: Please pick a location, or switch to "Use Home Assistant location".
error.update_interval_too_short: Update interval must be at least 6 hours.
